featureName: Sprint 7 — Feature Completion: Cloud Functions, Reviews, Notifications, Chat, Recommendations
description: Complete all remaining features to bring the app to full MVP. Fix broken Cloud Functions, implement review/rating system UI, build notification list page with badges, enhance chat with image support and read receipts, and add provider task recommendations based on category and location.

userStories.title: Fix Cloud Functions — onUserCreate & Timestamp Issues
userStories.description: Fix the broken onUserCreate Cloud Function that crashes with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading now)'. Audit all Cloud Functions for similar issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Read functions/src/index.ts (or functions/lib/index.js) and identify the Timestamp.now() error
Fix onUserCreate: replace broken Timestamp reference with admin.firestore.FieldValue.serverTimestamp() or admin.firestore.Timestamp.now()
Audit all 8 Cloud Functions for similar issues: onUserCreate, onTaskCreate, createEscrowPayment, releaseEscrow, stripeWebhookHandler, updateCompletenessScore, onTaskComplete, onReviewCreate
Fix any other broken imports or references found
Run `cd functions && npm run build` (or tsc) to verify compilation succeeds
Run `cd functions && npm test` if tests exist, or verify no build errors
Deploy functions to emulator and verify onUserCreate no longer crashes
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Review & Rating System — Submit Review UI
userStories.description: Build the UI for submitting reviews after task completion. Both poster and provider should be able to rate and review each other.
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/features/reviews/presentation/screens/submit_review_screen.dart
Screen accepts: taskId, reviewedUserId, reviewedUserName, taskCategory
UI includes: 5-star rating selector (tap to rate 1-5), comment text field (optional, max 500 chars), skill endorsement chips (optional, based on category), Submit button with loading state
On submit: create ReviewModel document in Firestore users/{reviewedUserId}/reviews subcollection
After successful submit: show success snackbar, navigate back
Add route /reviews/submit to AppRoutes and app_router.dart
Show 'Leave a Review' prompt on TaskDetailScreen when task is completed (for both poster and provider)
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Review & Rating System — Display Reviews
userStories.description: Display reviews on user profiles and calculate average ratings.
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/features/reviews/presentation/widgets/review_card.dart — shows reviewer avatar, name, rating stars, comment, time ago, category badge, skill endorsements
Create lib/features/reviews/presentation/widgets/rating_summary.dart — shows average rating (large number + stars), total review count, rating distribution bars (5/4/3/2/1 star counts)
Add reviews section to PublicProfileScreen: rating summary at top, list of ReviewCards below
Use existing profileRepository.watchReviews() stream for real-time data
Add provider stats display on ProfileScreen: completed tasks, avg rating, review count
Empty state when no reviews: 'No reviews yet'
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Notification System — UI & Badge Count
userStories.description: Build notification list screen and add unread badge counts to the bottom navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/features/notifications/presentation/screens/notification_list_screen.dart
Screen shows list of notifications from Firestore notifications/{uid} collection
Each notification tile shows: icon (based on type), title, body, time ago, read/unread indicator
Notification types: bid_received, bid_accepted, bid_rejected, task_completed, new_message, review_received
Tap notification navigates to relevant screen (task detail, chat, profile)
Mark notification as read on tap
Add notification bell icon to Home AppBar, tap opens NotificationListScreen
Add unread count badge to the notification bell icon (red circle with count)
Add route /notifications to AppRoutes and app_router.dart
Create notificationsProvider (StreamProvider) that watches unread count
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Chat Enhancement — Images, Read Receipts, Unread Count
userStories.description: Enhance chat with image sending, read receipts, and unread message count on Messages tab.
acceptanceCriteria: Image sending: tap image picker icon in ChatThreadScreen, pick image, upload to Firebase Storage chat_media/{chatId}/, send message with imageUrl field
Display image messages: show image thumbnail in message bubble (max 200x200), tap to open full screen with photo_view
Read receipts: when user opens ChatThreadScreen, mark all messages as read (update isRead field). Show double-check icon for read messages, single-check for sent
Unread count on Messages tab: add badge to Messages icon in bottom nav showing total unread messages across all chats
Create unreadChatsProvider that watches chats collection and sums unread counts
Update MainShellScreen bottom nav to show badge on Messages tab when unread > 0
ChatListScreen: show unread count badge on each chat tile
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Provider Task Recommendations
userStories.description: Improve ProviderHomeScreen with smart task recommendations based on provider's service categories and neighbourhood.
acceptanceCriteria: Update ProviderHomeScreen to show recommended tasks section: 'Recommended for You'
Recommendation logic: filter open tasks where categoryId matches provider's serviceCategories, prioritize tasks in same neighbourhood
Create a recommendedTasksProvider that combines user's serviceCategories + neighbourhood with open tasks query
Show up to 5 recommended tasks at top, then 'All Open Tasks' section below
If provider has no serviceCategories set, show prompt: 'Add your service categories in profile to get recommendations'
Each recommendation card shows: match reason ('Matches your skills', 'In your neighbourhood', 'Near you')
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Merge All Branches to Main & Final Verification
userStories.description: Merge all sprint branches to main, run full test suite, verify everything works.
acceptanceCriteria: Merge ralph/sprint-7-feature-completion into main branch
Run flutter analyze — 0 errors
Run flutter test — all unit tests pass (fix any broken tests from feature changes)
Verify app builds for iOS simulator without errors
Create a summary of all features completed across Sprint 1-7
